description: Month calendar grid displaying events per day cell with drag-and-drop reordering, context menu support, and a '+N more' overflow indicator. Used internally by TmScheduler.

parameters.name: CurrentDate
parameters.description: Currently displayed date (determines which month to show).

parameters.name: MaxVisibleEvents
parameters.description: Max events visible per day cell before showing "+N more".

parameters.name: OnSlotClick
parameters.description: Fires when a day cell is clicked.

parameters.name: OnEventClick
parameters.description: Fires when an event is clicked.

parameters.name: OnEventChanged
parameters.description: Fires when an event is moved via drag and drop.

parameters.name: OnSlotContextMenu
parameters.description: Fires when right-clicking on an empty day slot.

parameters.name: OnEventContextMenu
parameters.description: Fires when right-clicking on an event.

examples.title: Month view with events
examples.code: <TmSchedulerMonthView CurrentDate="DateTime.Today" Events="@_events" MaxVisibleEvents="3" OnSlotClick="@HandleSlotClick" OnEventClick="@HandleEventClick" OnEventChanged="@HandleEventDrop" />
